description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular base and a slightly curved profile, featuring a prominent display screen and a control panel with a single joystick. The front panel displays the game title 'TWOFISH SERPENT' on a marquee above the screen, and the words 'GAME OVER' are visible on the screen itself. The cabinet is adorned with vibrant, fantasy-themed artwork, including a large serpent and a dramatic landscape in shades of purple, red, and orange, which wraps around both side panels. The control panel is simple, with a single red joystick and no visible buttons, suggesting a single-player setup. The top and rear surfaces are plain and dark, contrasting with the colorful sides. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with a glass or plastic screen cover and some metal or plastic trim.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with fantasy serpent artwork, a single joystick, and a vibrant marquee. The cabinet features a colorful side design and a simple front control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee with 'TWOFISH SERPENT', the display screen with 'GAME OVER', and a single red joystick on the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fantasy artwork with a serpent and landscape in purple and red tones.
description_view_2: Top view showing the plain, dark surface of the cabinet with no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the serpent artwork, including the serpent's head and dramatic background.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick, no visible buttons, and a simple, uncluttered design
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the game title 'TWOFISH SERPENT' in bold letters with a fantasy theme, using blue, yellow, and orange colors, matching the side artwork
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vibrant fantasy artwork depicting a large serpent and a dramatic, colorful landscape in purples, reds, and oranges
